title: Arwen's Furniture 2
description: A furniture datapack that adds a series of high-quality furniture items / models to the game, craftable in a crafting table.
body:
# Arwen's Furniture 2 - by ArwenOC
## 1.2.0 Functional Fixtures Update
## Resource Pack
Arwen's Furniture has a **required resource pack**! Make sure to install it before using. The resource pack can be found as a secondary file in each version description.

## Description
**Arwen's Furniture 2** is the long-awaited sequel to Arwen's Furniture!
The pack contains all of the content of the original, but is built on a new, faster, simpler system which allows for add-on packs (which will be released separately).

This datapack adds a variety of _high-quality_ 3D model furniture to the game.
Dyeable furniture can now be dyed **ANY COLOR** using dyes in a crafting table.

The recipes for all furniture items are unlocked simply by logging into the world, and can be found in the crafting table recipe book.

## Furniture Items
### Wooden Furniture

Chairs, Tables, Large Tables, Benches (2 Seats), End Tables, and Dressers.
### Dyeable Wooden Furniture

Cushioned Chairs, Tables with Tablecloths, Large Tables with Tablecloths, Cushioned Benches (2 Seats), Lounge Chairs, and Couches (2 Seats).
### Dyeable Banners, Rugs, and Awnings
_(+Patterns = Right Click to Change Decoration Pattern)_

Banner (1x3), Large Banner (2x5), Decorated Banner (1x3, +Patterns), Large Decorated Banner (2x5, +Patterns), Rug, Decorated Rug (+Patterns) Circular Rug, Decorated Circular Rug (+Patterns), Awning, Striped Awning (+Patterns).
### Dyeable Candle Lighting Fixtures
_(Comes In Iron, Gold, Copper, Exposed Copper, Weathered Copper, and Oxidized Copper)_

Candlestick, Wall Candle, Candelabra, Chandelier.
### Planters / Basket Planters
_(Dyeable) (Most vanilla plants can be planted inside, including 2 tall, and some funky ones like chorus flowers)._

Planter, Small Planter, Large Planter, Basket Planter, Small Basket Planter, Large Basket Planter.Wall Planter, Small Wall Planter, Large Wall Planter, Basket Wall Planter, Small Basket Wall Planter, Large Basket Wall Planter.
### Brazier Light Fixtures
_(Comes In Iron, Gold, Copper, Exposed Copper, Weathered Copper, and Oxidized Copper)_

Brazier, Pole Brazier, Wall Brazier.
### Stone Statue and Mannequins
_(Can be posed [Shift Right Click] and used as hot-swap armor stands [Right Click])_

Stone Statue, Mannequins, Mannequin Stands.
### Potion Bottles
_(Can be filled with a potion [Right Click] with a drinkable potion or water bottle. Empty bottle clears liquid)_

Potion Bottle, Tall Potion Bottle, Large Potion Bottle, Large Tall Potion Bottle, Giant Potion Bottle, Gigantic Potion Bottle.+ When filled with a potion, they glow in the dark!
### Frames
_(Dyeable Painting/Block Frame) (Size can be changed [Right Click] to any size between and including 1x1 and 4x4 (Ex, 2x3, 3x2, 1x4))_

Frame (+Size Variants).

----------------------------------

_Some items, such as striped awnings and decorated banners, can be crafted with a decoration color, such as yellow, which will make part of the design yellow permanently, and the rest of the design dyeable with any dye in a crafting table._

## Crafting / Dying Furniture
Furniture recipes are immediately unlocked through an advancement when joining the world. Furniture items can be crafted and dyed entirely in the crafting table. Any combination of dyes can be used one at a time or all at once on dyeable furniture items.

## Placing Furniture
Furniture items will be listed as either a Floor Item, or Wall Item, and can only be placed on each surface respectively. Holding the item in the main or off and and right clicking on the correct surface will place the item down.

## Interactable Furniture
Some furniture items, such as chairs and decorated banners, can be interacted with. Right clicking any type of seat will sit the player down onto the furniture. Items with "variants" in their description can be right clicked once placed down to change the variant of the item.

## Commands
All furniture items can be obtained by operators using the proper get function commands.
Examples:
- `function af.base:item/get/awning` (All Awnings),
- `function af.base:item/get/wood/bench` (All benches),
- `function af.base:item/get/wood/chair_dyed` (All cushioned chairs),

## Settings
In some cases, other datapacks will cause issues with this datapack. In those cases, settings should be provided to reduce or resolve those issues. All settings can be found and modified using their proper functions: `function af.base:setting/(setting name)`. (EX: `function af.base:setting/shulker_hitbox` disables shulker hitboxes for tables).

## Add-Ons
Arwen's Furniture 2 is a modular system that supports add-on datapacks. In the future, datapacks containing different sets of furniture will be released (Such as Appliances, Statues, etc.), which can be installed alongside Arwen's Furniture 2. This way, users can control which furniture items they would like players to use in their world. Add-ons will be released as datapacks, and the 3D models associated with each add-on will be added to the singular Arwen's Furniture 2 resource pack, updated on this page, in order to keep installing the resource pack as simple as possible.

## Thanks!
**Thank you for playing my datapack**! I really appreciate your feedback, and I'm grateful to have this platform to share my work with you all. Thanks for downloading and enjoy!

**If you plan to show this datapack off in a video, please link this page in the description. Thanks!**
